zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella Strathearn於1328年出生在英國蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯時，她的父親Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn51歲，母親Margery Ross35歲。她於1345年之前與William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin在蘇格蘭奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1391年4月13日在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林享年63歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella Strathearn于1328年出生在英国苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯时，她的父亲Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn51岁，母亲Margery Ross35岁。她于1345年之前与William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin在苏格兰奧可尼奧可尼 易曼德斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1391年4月13日在苏格兰米德洛迪安洛斯林享年63岁，埋葬在苏格兰斯林史爾斯特拉斯賀布藍。

nameMeanings.name: Strathearn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Strathearn in Perthshire. The placename means ‘the valley of the river Earn’, from Gaelic srath ‘valley’ + the river name Earn.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella Strathearn was born in 1328, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn, was 51 and her mother, Margery Ross, was 35. She married William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin before 1345, in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 April 1391, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, at the age of 63, and was buried in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella Strathearn est née en 1328, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Margery Ross, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin avant 1345, à Orkney Islands, Orkney, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 avril 1391, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella Strathearn 1328 in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn 51 und ihre Mutter Margery Ross 35. Sie hat vor 1345 in Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. April 1391 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland und wurde in Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Strathearn è nata il nel 1328 nel Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Margery Ross, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin prima del 1345, nel Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 aprile 1391, nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella Strathearnが1328年にイギリススコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズで生まれた時，父Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearnは51歳，母Margery Rossは35歳であった。1345年以前にスコットランドオルクニーオルクニー イスランズでWilliam Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1391年4月13日にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで63歳で死去し，スコットランドスティルリングシュアイアストラスブランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella Strathearn(이)가 1328년 영국 스코틀랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Ross(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1345년 이전 스컷랜드 르니 르니 이슬랜드즈에서 William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 4월 13일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 스트래스블랜에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella Strathearn nasceu em 1328, em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Margery Ross, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin antes 1345, em Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de abril de 1391, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella Strathearn родилась в 1328 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Ross, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin перед 1345 г. в местности орни исландс, орни, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 апреля 1391 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности стратблан, стирлингшир, Шотландия.

sm.from 1345 to 1404: mai le 1345 e o'o I le 1404

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella Strathearn nació en 1328, en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Malise Strathearn 7th Earl of Strathearn, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Margery Ross, tenía 35 años. Se casó con William Sinclair 8th Lord of Roslin antes de 1345, en Orkney Islands, Orkney, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de abril de 1391, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Strathblane, Stirlingshire, Scotland.
